mnemonics: D.A.S.H. to Analyze Non-Recursive: Determine input size, Analyze basic op, Set up sum, Handle sum
keyPoints: Set up a summation formula for the basic operation count
Solve the summation to find time complexity in Big-O notation
Consider best-case, worst-case, and average-case scenarios
commonMistakes: Assuming all operations have equal cost and should be counted
Incorrectly identifying the input size (e.g., using value instead of size)
Forgetting to simplify the summation result to its asymptotic growth rate (Big-O)
Overlooking constant factors that don't affect Big-O but are important for actual runtime comparison
Applying recursive analysis techniques to non-recursive algorithms
